title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: AI Master demonstrates ImagineArt Film Studio, a browser-based platform for generating AI short films with character consistency across multiple scenes. The tool includes storyboard mode to lock character appearance, multi-shot generation with camera presets, an Extend feature for longer shots, and a built-in timeline editor for rendering without external software.
